SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-20-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-20-2016 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE CAROLINA PALACIOS DOMINGUEZ, SENIOR CUSTOMER SERVICE AT APOYA FINANCIERO, INC., AND DEFENDANT MANUEL ANTONIO ARGUETA MEJIA. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER CLIFFORD HENDERSON ASSISTED MR. MEJIA AT TODAY'S HEAIRNG. PARTIES SIGNED THE STIPUALTION FOR PRO TEM JUDGE. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DIANNE PEEBLES. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
